targetCountry.title: Target Country for Phones
targetCountry.description: Select the target country to use optimized phone number pattern matching.

enableCharging.title: Enable Pay-Per-Event Charging
enableCharging.description: Enable only after Apify Store paid events are configured for this Actor.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of requests that can be made by this crawler.

followLinks.title: Follow Useful Links
followLinks.description: Follow contact, about, services, and profile links found on each page.

maxFollowLinksPerPage.title: Max Follow Links Per Page
maxFollowLinksPerPage.description: Maximum number of useful links to enqueue from each scanned page.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Enable only if your Apify account has Proxy access.
